items.name: Ltd — Private Limited Liability Company
items.desc: Мин. капитал: EUR 1,164.69 (minimum issued share capital). 3–5 business days
items.note:
Ответственность: Limited to share capital
Сроки: 3–5 business days
Стоимость: EUR 1,000–2,500 (registration fees, legal, accounting)
Шаги регистрации:
Reserve company name with the Malta Business Registry (MBR)
Prepare Memorandum and Articles of Association
Submit incorporation documents to MBR
Deposit minimum share capital in a bank account
Obtain Tax Identification Number (TIN) from Commissioner for Revenue
Register for VAT with the VAT Department
Register with Employment and Training Corporation (Jobsplus)

items.name: Soc. in accomandita — Partnership en commandite
items.desc: Мин. капитал: No minimum. 3–5 business days
items.note:
Ответственность: At least one general partner with unlimited liability; limited partners liable up to contribution
Сроки: 3–5 business days
Стоимость: EUR 500–1,500
Шаги регистрации:
Draft partnership deed
Register with MBR
Obtain TIN
Register for VAT if applicable

items.name: Soc. in nome collettivo — Partnership en nom collectif
items.desc: Мин. капитал: No minimum. 3–5 business days
items.note:
Ответственность: All partners jointly and severally liable
Сроки: 3–5 business days
Стоимость: EUR 500–1,500
Шаги регистрации:
Draft partnership deed
Register with MBR
Obtain TIN
Register for VAT

items.name: Trading Licence
items.desc: [Розничная торговля] Malta Competition and Consumer Affairs Authority (MCCAA)
items.note:
Выдаёт: Malta Competition and Consumer Affairs Authority (MCCAA)
Требования:
• Registered business entity
• Premises compliant with health and safety regulations
• Valid identification documents
Срок действия: Annual renewal
Стоимость: EUR 100–500

items.name: Catering Establishment Licence
items.note:
Выдаёт: Malta Tourism Authority (MTA)
Требования:
• Compliant premises (fire safety, sanitation)
• Food safety management system (HACCP)
• Health certificate for food handlers
• Planning Authority (PA) permit for commercial use
Срок действия: Annual renewal
Стоимость: EUR 200–1,500

items.name: Hotel/Accommodation Licence
items.note:
Выдаёт: Malta Tourism Authority (MTA)
Требования:
• Property classification and grading
• Fire safety certificate
• Health and safety compliance
• PA permit
Срок действия: Annual renewal
Стоимость: EUR 500–3,000

items.name: Liquor Licence
items.note:
Выдаёт: Commissioner of Police
Требования:
• Clean criminal record
• Premises compliance
• Neighbourhood notification
Срок действия: Annual
Стоимость: EUR 100–300

items.name: Professional Warrant / Trade Licence
items.desc: [Услуги и ремёсла] Relevant professional body / MCCAA
items.note:
Выдаёт: Relevant professional body / MCCAA
Требования:
• Recognised qualifications
• Professional indemnity insurance (where applicable)
• Registration with relevant professional council
Срок действия: Varies by profession
Стоимость: EUR 50–500

items.name: Development Planning Permit (industrial premises)
items.note:
Выдаёт: Planning Authority (PA)
Требования:
• Architectural and engineering plans
• Environmental Impact Assessment (where required)
• Fire safety compliance
• Waste management plan
Срок действия: Indefinite (subject to conditions)
Стоимость: EUR 1,000–10,000

items.name: IPPC Permit (for larger installations)
items.note:
Выдаёт: Environment and Resources Authority (ERA)
Требования:
• Environmental impact assessment
• Emissions monitoring plan
• Best Available Techniques (BAT) compliance
Срок действия: Periodic review
Стоимость: EUR 2,000–10,000

items.name: Road Transport Operator Licence
items.note:
Выдаёт: Transport Malta
Требования:
• Certificate of Professional Competence (CPC)
• Financial standing evidence
• Adequate vehicle insurance
• Good repute declaration
Срок действия: 5 years (renewable)
Стоимость: EUR 200–1,000

items.name: Warehouse / Logistics Centre Permit
items.note:
Выдаёт: Planning Authority (PA)
Требования:
• Planning permit for commercial/industrial use
• Fire safety certificate
• Customs warehouse authorisation (if applicable)
Срок действия: Indefinite (subject to conditions)
Стоимость: EUR 500–3,000

items.name: Налоговый режим — Розничная торговля
items.note:
vat_standard: 18%
vat_reduced: 7% (accommodation, sporting facilities), 5% (electricity, artworks, medical equipment)
corporate_tax: 35% (statutory), effective 5% after shareholder refund system (6/7ths refund)
notes: Malta's imputation system allows shareholders to claim a 6/7ths refund on tax paid by the company, reducing the effective rate to ~5%. This applies to trading income. The refund must be claimed by the shareholder after dividend distribution.

items.name: Налоговый режим — HoReCa (общепит)
items.note:
vat_standard: 18%
vat_reduced: 7% (accommodation), 5% (electricity)
corporate_tax: 35% (statutory) / 5% effective with refund
notes: Accommodation services taxed at reduced 7% VAT. Eco-contribution may apply to certain tourism services.

items.name: Налоговый режим — Услуги и ремёсла
items.note:
vat_standard: 18%
vat_reduced: 7%, 5%
corporate_tax: 35% / 5% effective
notes: Micro Invest Tax Credit scheme: tax credits up to EUR 50,000 for micro and small enterprises. Self-employed individuals taxed on progressive scale (0%–35%).

items.name: Налоговый режим — Производство
items.note:
vat_standard: 18%
vat_reduced: 5% (certain supplies)
corporate_tax: 35% / 5% effective
notes: Malta Enterprise incentives: tax credits, soft loans, and grants for manufacturing investment. SmartCity Malta special economic zone.

items.name: Налоговый режим — Логистика и склад
items.note:
vat_standard: 18%
vat_reduced: 0% (international transport services)
corporate_tax: 35% / 5% effective
notes: Freeport zones available. Malta is a major EU transhipment hub (Mediterranean). VAT exempt on international freight transport.

items.name: Обзор бизнес-регистрации — Malta
items.note: Мальта: Номинальный корпоративный налог 35%, но эффективная ставка ~5% благодаря системе возврата 6/7 налога акционерам. НДС 18%/7%/5%. Основная форма — Private Ltd (минимальный капитал 1.164,69 EUR). Регистрация в Malta Business Registry за 3–5 дней. Malta Enterprise предоставляет налоговые кредиты, гранты и мягкие кредиты. Micro Invest: налоговые кредиты до 50.000 EUR для малого бизнеса. Свободные зоны (Freeport). Мальта — крупный транзитный хаб ЕС в Средиземноморье.
